mission_overview.mission: Ship v4.0.0 as the one-screen Human Recognition Interface powered by the Human Recognition Packet above governed workforce reasoning.
mission_overview.operating_goal: Define the first post-v4.0 frontier that preserves the Human Recognition Interface contract while making governed workforce runtime decisions more operationally decisive.
mission_overview.next_value_slice: Choose the narrowest v5.0 slice that keeps one-screen human recognition truthful while turning governed workforce semantics into stronger live allocation and escalation judgment.

next_action.recommended_action: Start TASK-047: Define v5.0 governed runtime priorities after the Human Recognition Interface release
next_action.rationale: This is the best open task aligned with the current operating goal and next release frontier.
